'''hagofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mnemometer|mnemometer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-g-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mnemometer|mnemometer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hagofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hægefeth|hægefeth]] || [[word:hægefej|hægefej]] || [[word:hægefesh|hægefesh]] || [[word:hægefe|hægefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hagogofoth|hagogofoth]] || [[word:hagogofoj|hagogofoj]] || [[word:hagogofosh|hagogofosh]] || [[word:hagogofo|hagogofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hagofoth|hagofoth]] || [[word:hagofoj|hagofoj]] || [[word:hagofosh|hagofosh]] || [[word:hagofo|hagofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hagoffoth|hagoffoth]] || [[word:hagoffoj|hagoffoj]] || [[word:hagoffosh|hagoffosh]] || [[word:hagoffof|hagoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hagofotho|hagofotho]] || [[word:hagofojo|hagofojo]] || [[word:hagofosho|hagofosho]] || [[word:hagofoko|hagofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hagofoth|hagofoth]] || [[word:hagofoj|hagofoj]] || [[word:hagofosh|hagofosh]] || [[word:hagofo|hagofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hagofothol|hagofothol]] || [[word:hagofojol|hagofojol]] || [[word:hagofoshol|hagofoshol]] || [[word:hagofokol|hagofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hagofothotho|hagofothotho]] || [[word:hagofojojo|hagofojojo]] || [[word:hagofoshosho|hagofoshosho]] || [[word:hagofoko|hagofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hagofothon|hagofothon]] || [[word:hagofojon|hagofojon]] || [[word:hagofoshon|hagofoshon]] || [[word:hagofokon|hagofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hagofothoro|hagofothoro]] || [[word:hagofojoro|hagofojoro]] || [[word:hagofoshoro|hagofoshoro]] || [[word:hagofokoro|hagofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
